suite.name: 01 Auth

kw.name: Get Time
kw.doc: Returns the given time in the requested format.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=backend, url=http://localhost:51734, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:51734/v1/auth/signup path_url=/v1/auth/signup headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '105', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "e2e-auth-1776359698@tennetctl.test", "password": "pass-E2E-1234!", "display_name": "E2E User"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": true, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/Users/sri/Documents/tennetctl/tests/e2e/results/iam/browser/traces/temp/64737528-8220-4634-a392-11e0be3a386d"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: about:blank
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

test.name: Signin Shows User In Topbar

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="signin-form"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'e2e-auth-1776359698@tennetctl.test' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'pass-E2E-1234!' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Load State
kw.msg: Waiting page load to state to receive networkidle in 10000.0
kw.doc: Waits that the page reaches the required load state.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="topbar-user-name"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: Navigate to /auth/signin, fill credentials, submit, verify topbar displays the user's email.

test.name: Signout Redirects To Signin

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [data-testid="topbar-signout"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Load State
kw.msg: Waiting page load to state to receive networkidle in 10000.0
kw.doc: Waits that the page reaches the required load state.

kw.name: Get Url
kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: Click Sign Out in topbar, verify page goes to /auth/signin and the sign-in link is visible (user is logged out).

test.name: Protected Page Redirects Unauthenticated User

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Load State
kw.msg: Waiting page load to state to receive networkidle in 10000.0
kw.doc: Waits that the page reaches the required load state.

kw.name: Get Url
kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: Navigate directly to /vault without a session. The app should redirect to /auth/signin.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc: IAM Auth UI — signin / signout / redirect E2E. Drives live backend (51734) + frontend (51735). Creates a test user via API, signs in via UI, checks topbar, signs out, and verifies redirect to signin page.
